name: Steamed Lobster Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Spiny lobsters, 1 1/2 pounds each (may substitute Maine lobsters)
1 Medium red onion, sliced, paper thin
1 Pound almost overripe tomatoes, diced 1/4 inch
2 Cups arugula, washed and spun dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove meat from lobster and cut into 1/2-inch pieces (leave claws whole, out of shell, if using Maine lobster). Place in a large mixing bowl.
2. Add celery, onion, tomatoes, garlic, basil, mint, olive oil, lemon juice to the bowl.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Add arugula and toss to coat.
6. Serve sprinkled with lemon zest.
Yield: 4 servings
